title: Duck's Vanilaia
description: Vanilaia is a new modpack that includes a bunch of exploring and lore to uncover an endless world of the Kingdom of Eldoria and find out its dark past in a world that looks peaceful
body:
# Vanilaia Lore
![lore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a54483208c81681724d7d15d2a0da3175bc8abe6.png)
**You were sent out to explore the Kingdom of Eldoria, and you have many paths sent out for you. You and your parents lived on the outskirts of Eldoria. You decide to go out and explore and live, but what you didn't expect was that your journey would take you to a place that requires some eyes to get there. It would be a hard journey, but you're determined.**

##  End Remastered By Jack Bagel
![end](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5466be46b4affe8f08827ef7e7a275b7286e8887_0.webp)
**Thanks to End Remastered by Jack Bagel, we get to add a better ending to Vanilaia. Getting to the end has never been easy, but with this, it makes it more challenging. Getting to the end is your path to helping Eldoria, but if luck is on your side, the entities should be easy only you can decide that, so choose the right things to do in your journey in a world where you're its last hope.**

## RPG Series By Daedelus
![rpg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de70e8d6a41792080608dd89d6f2b4304eb5814f.png)
**RPG Series adds a lot and is a support beam for Vanilaia's Lore and for your playthrough. It adds a lot more weapons, classes, and a new focus tree. Each class has its benefits, and the starting weapon you'll get, choose wisely because you'll be unable to change your class after choosing.**

## Credits and license
![everycompact](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03a5abd959eb5a702e19b55d08806139914ff967_0.webp)
**I'd love to say thank you to all the mod and resource pack owners/creators for making them. You guys have changed how Minecraft is. License: You may not claim as your own or sell it**
